meaning: n.卡蒂(Kate 的异体 亦作Katy)(f.)
examples: All raise your glasses and drink to Katie and Tom!
It was not an easy task for Katie.
Katie made up her mind to foster her for real.
Take, for example, Katie Sepich, a 22-year-old graduate student at New Mexico State University.
Kamiko Williams is an intriguing player who should learn well from veterans like Katie Smith.
